title: No Need In Shaders
description: Modpack that makes your game look good without shaders.
body:
## 100% client side modpack that turns your game into the masterpiece **WITHOUT** shaders!

So i made this resource pack because i saw this video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YmEhRtLIgk0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I dont know what i should type here.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thanks to the mod and resourcepack developers for their creations.
If i didnt credit someone or you dont want to see your creation in my modpack tell me and i will credit/remove your creation.
